languages.text: {n}Шумная, пахнущая священными маслами и потом процессия затихает, стоит вам появиться перед ними. Стоящие во главе толпы люди выступают вперед: один из них размахивает замотанной культей правой руки, второй — потрясенно разглядывает вас единственным глазом. Взгляды медикариев, окруженных заслоном из блюстителей, тоже направлены в вашу сторону.{/n}

traits.locale_text: чернь пришла, топится. Вперед выходят двое еще не старых, крепких ребят, один из них с культей.

languages.text: {n}The noisy procession, smelling of sacred unguents and sweat, falls silent as soon as you appear. Those at the head of the crowd step forward, one of them waving the wrapped stump of his right arm, while another gawps at you with his one eye. The medicae officers, shielded by a line of enforcers, also stare in your direction.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Шумная, пахнущая священными маслами и потом процессия затихает, стоит вам появиться перед ними. Стоящие во главе толпы люди выступают вперед: один из них размахивает замотанной культей правой руки, второй — потрясенно разглядывает вас единственным глазом. Взгляды медикариев, окруженных заслоном из блюстителей, тоже направлены в вашу сторону.{/n}

languages.text: {n}騒々しい行列は、聖なる香油と汗の匂いを漂わせ、あなたが現れると静まり返る。群れの先頭の人たちは前に出てきて、その一人は右腕の切り株を包んで振る。もう一人は片目であなたを見つめる。警備隊の列の後ろに隠れた軍医たちもあなたの方を見る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noisy procession, smelling of sacred unguents and sweat, falls silent as soon as you appear. Those at the head of the crowd step forward, one of them waving the wrapped stump of his right arm, while another gawps at you with his one eye. The medicae officers, shielded by a line of enforcers, also stare in your direction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 騒々しい行列は、聖なる香油と汗の匂いを漂わせ、あなたが現れると静まり返る。群れの先頭の人たちは前に出てきて、その一人は右腕の切り株を包んで振る。もう一人は片目であなたを見つめる。警備隊の列の後ろに隠れた軍医たちもあなたの方を見る。

languages.text: {n}Kutsal özyağ ve ter kokan gürültülü kafile, sen görünür görünmez sessizliğe bürünüyor. Kalabalığın başındakiler öne çıkıyor. Biri sağ kolunun sarılı güdüğünü sallarken diğeri, tek gözüyle sana bakıyor. Bir infazcı sırasının koruduğu sıhhiye subayları da sana doğru bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noisy procession, smelling of sacred unguents and sweat, falls silent as soon as you appear. Those at the head of the crowd step forward, one of them waving the wrapped stump of his right arm, while another gawps at you with his one eye. The medicae officers, shielded by a line of enforcers, also stare in your direction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kutsal özyağ ve ter kokan gürültülü kafile, sen görünür görünmez sessizliğe bürünüyor. Kalabalığın başındakiler öne çıkıyor. Biri sağ kolunun sarılı güdüğünü sallarken diğeri, tek gözüyle sana bakıyor. Bir infazcı sırasının koruduğu sıhhiye subayları da sana doğru bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La ruidosa procesión, envuelta en el olor de los ungüentos sagrados y el sudor, se queda en silencio en cuanto haces acto de presencia. Los que la lideran dan un paso al frente, uno de ellos agitando el muñón vendado de su brazo derecho, mientras que otro mira atónito con su único ojo. Los oficiales de medicae, protegidos por una línea de guardias, también se giran para observarte.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noisy procession, smelling of sacred unguents and sweat, falls silent as soon as you appear. Those at the head of the crowd step forward, one of them waving the wrapped stump of his right arm, while another gawps at you with his one eye. The medicae officers, shielded by a line of enforcers, also stare in your direction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La ruidosa procesión, envuelta en el olor de los ungüentos sagrados y el sudor, se queda en silencio en cuanto haces acto de presencia. Los que la lideran dan un paso al frente, uno de ellos agitando el muñón vendado de su brazo derecho, mientras que otro mira atónito con su único ojo. Los oficiales de medicae, protegidos por una línea de guardias, también se giran para observarte.{/n}

languages.text: {n}喧闹的队伍散发着神圣机油与汗水混合的气味。他们见你出现，便立刻鸦雀无声。前排的两人走了上来，其中一人挥舞着包扎过的右臂残肢，另一人则用仅剩的一只眼注视着你。在一排执法者护卫下的医务官们也纷纷将目光投向了你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noisy procession, smelling of sacred unguents and sweat, falls silent as soon as you appear. Those at the head of the crowd step forward, one of them waving the wrapped stump of his right arm, while another gawps at you with his one eye. The medicae officers, shielded by a line of enforcers, also stare in your direction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}喧闹的队伍散发着神圣机油与汗水混合的气味。他们见你出现，便立刻鸦雀无声。前排的两人走了上来，其中一人挥舞着包扎过的右臂残肢，另一人则用仅剩的一只眼注视着你。在一排执法者护卫下的医务官们也纷纷将目光投向了你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dès que vous vous présentez devant la procession bruyante, qui empeste les onguents sacrés et la sueur, le silence se fait. Les deux individus menant le groupe s'avancent : l'un d'eux agite le moignon bandé de son bras droit, tandis que l'autre vous regarde d'un air hébété de son unique œil. Les officiers de medicae, protégés par une rangée de prévôts, se tournent eux aussi vers vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noisy procession, smelling of sacred unguents and sweat, falls silent as soon as you appear. Those at the head of the crowd step forward, one of them waving the wrapped stump of his right arm, while another gawps at you with his one eye. The medicae officers, shielded by a line of enforcers, also stare in your direction.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dès que vous vous présentez devant la procession bruyante, qui empeste les onguents sacrés et la sueur, le silence se fait. Les deux individus menant le groupe s'avancent : l'un d'eux agite le moignon bandé de son bras droit, tandis que l'autre vous regarde d'un air hébété de son unique œil. Les officiers de medicae, protégés par une rangée de prévôts, se tournent eux aussi vers vous.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die lautstarke Prozession, die nach Heiliger Substanz und Schweiß riecht, verstummt bei deinem Erscheinen sofort. Zwei Personen an der Spitze der Menge treten vor. Einer wedelt mit dem bandagierten Stumpf seines rechten Arms, der andere starrt dich mit seinem verbliebenen Auge an. Die Medicae-Offiziere, abgeschirmt von einer Reiher Enforcer, blicken ebenfalls in deine Richtung.{/n}

Those at the head of the crowd step forward, one of them waving the wrapped stump of his right arm, while another gawps at you with his one eye. The medicae officers, shielded by a line of enforcers, also stare in your direction.{/n}
